backstory.original: An outcast even from her home city of Omu on Chult, Sisaspia does not seek wealth or glory for herself. Instead, she wishes only to hone her powers, and anyone or anything that gets in her way will learn that she has already made great strides towards doing so. A reluctant ally, she joins the Champions solely because they are a means to an end: an endless stream of foes on which to unleash and perfect her sinister machinations.
backstory.display: 即使在她的家乡--楚尔特的奥穆，西萨庇亚也是被抛弃的人。她不为自己谋求财富或荣耀，相反，她只希望磨练自己的力量。任何挡在她路上的人或事，都会了解到她的努力已经取得了多大的回报。她不情愿地加入勇士的队伍，只是为了把他们当成达成目标的一种手段：有无穷无尽的敌人，可以供她释放和完善她的邪恶阴谋。

description.original: Sisaspia unleashes a wave of necrotic energy upon a random enemy. Deals additional damage to plants, but no damage to undead/constructs.
description.display: 西萨庇亚对一名随机敌人释放一股死灵能量。对植物造成额外伤害，但对亡灵和构装生物无伤害。

description.original: Sisaspia causes all of her spores currently affecting her enemies to delve deep into their targets and tear them apart from the inside, dealing massive damage.
description.display: 西萨庇亚命令当前所有吸附在敌人身上的孢子钻进目标体内深处，从内部将其撕裂，造成高额伤害。

longDescription.original: Sisaspia causes all of her spores currently affecting her enemies to delve deep into their targets and tear them apart from the inside, dealing massive damage based on the total number of spores in play.
longDescription.display: 西萨庇亚命令当前所有吸附在敌人身上的孢子钻进目标体内深处，从内部将其撕裂，根据当前孢子总数量造成高额伤害。

description.original: Sisaspia maintains a reserve of small, near-invisible spores which she infects enemies with as they approach. Infected enemies take additional damage over time from all hits.
description.display: 西萨庇亚维持少量几乎不可见的孢子，在敌人靠近时吸附到敌人身上。被感染的敌人在一段时间内受到额外伤害。

description.original: Sisaspia buffs those nearby using her reserve of spores, increasing their damage and eventually healing them as well.
description.display: 西萨庇亚用掌控的孢子增益附近队友，提升伤害并给予治疗。

conditions.desc: Sisaspia is surrounded by a torus of necrotic spores that cause enemies to take additional damage over time when attached to them.

Sisaspia is surrounded by a torus of necrotic spores. Every second, one of the spores shoots out and attaches itself to an enemy that is near the formation. When enemies are damaged, they take $(amount___2)% additional damage over 5 seconds for each spore affecting them. Normal enemies can only be affected by 4 spores, while bosses can be affected by 10 spores. Sisaspia regenerates a spore every 3 seconds and can have up to 30 spores in her reserve.^^$halo_of_spores_description2

Sisaspia is surrounded by a torus of necrotic spores. Every second, one of the spores shoots out and attaches itself to an enemy that is near the formation. When enemies are damaged, they take $(amount___2)% additional damage over 5 seconds for each spore affecting them. Normal enemies can only be affected by 4 spores, while bosses can be affected by 10 spores. Sisaspia regenerates a spore every 4 seconds and can have up to 20 spores in her reserve.^^$halo_of_spores_description2
西萨庇亚周围环绕着死灵孢子，被孢子附着在身上的敌人会随时间推移受到额外伤害。
西萨庇亚周围环绕着死灵孢子。每秒都会发射一个孢子并附着在阵型附近的敌人身上。当敌人受到伤害时，每被一个孢子影响，就会在 5 秒内额外受到 $(amount___2)% 的伤害。普通敌人只能被 4 个孢子影响，而首领可以被 10 个孢子影响。西萨庇亚每 3 秒再生一个孢子，她最多可以储存 30 个孢子。^^$halo_of_spores_description2
西萨庇亚周围环绕着死灵孢子。每秒都会发射一个孢子并附着在阵型附近的敌人身上。当敌人受到伤害时，每被一个孢子影响，就会在 5 秒内额外受到 $(amount___2)% 的伤害。普通敌人只能被 4 个孢子影响，而首领可以被 10 个孢子影响。西萨庇亚每 4 秒再生一个孢子，她最多可以储存 20 个孢子。^^$halo_of_spores_description2

tipText.original: Sisaspia infects enemies as they approach, causing them to take additional damage over time from each attack.
tipText.display: 西萨庇亚在敌人靠近时感染对方，使其每次攻击时都会受到额外的持续伤害。

description.desc: Sisaspia uses her reserve of necrotic spores to empower a subtle infection she maintains upon her "companions", goading them forward and hopefully assisting her in her own selfish goals. This infection increases the damage of all Champions within 2 slots of herself by 33% for each spore she has used in the current area, stacking multiplicatively, up to a maximum equal to her maximum spore reserve.
西萨庇亚利用她备用的腐败孢子，巧妙控制她的“伙伴”，刺激它们持续行动，以协助或满足她自身的期望。对于她在当前区域使用的每一个孢子，这种感染会使距离她 2 个栏位内的所有勇士的伤害提高 33%，以乘算方式堆叠，最大值等于她的最大孢子储备。

tipText.original: Sisaspia uses the spores she has in reserve to buff nearby Champions.
tipText.display: 西萨庇亚使用储备的孢子来强化附近的勇士。

description.desc: Sisaspia's subtle infection heals damaged Champions within 2 slots of herself for $(amount) per second for each spore she has used in the current area, up to a maximum equal to her maximum spore reserve.
对于她在当前区域使用的每一个孢子，西萨庇亚的轻微感染每秒为距离她 2 格内所有受伤的勇士回复 $(amount) 生命值，最大值等于她的最大孢子储备。

Sisaspia's maximum spore reserve is increased by the average DEX score of the formation, rounded down. Additionally, if the average DEX score is 16 or higher, the range of Halo of Spores is additively increased by 12.5% for each full point above 15.
西萨庇亚的最大孢子储备数量提高，数值相当于阵型的敏捷平均值，向下取整。此外，如果平均敏捷值为 16 或以上，则 15 以上的每一点数值均使“孢子光晕”的范围扩大 12.5%（以加算方式堆叠）。

specializationDescription.original: Sisaspia concentrates on improving the effect of the subtle infections she maintains on nearby Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 西萨庇亚专注于强化她对附近勇士施加的轻微感染效果。

description.desc: Halo of Spores now generates a new spore every $amount seconds, and Sisaspia's maximum reserve spore count is increased by $amount___2.
孢子光晕现在每 $amount 秒生成一颗新孢子，而西萨庇亚的最大备用孢子量也增加 $amount___2。

specializationDescription.original: Sisaspia endeavours to create spores more quickly and keep more in reserve to power her subtle infections.
specializationDescription.display: 西萨庇亚提高产生孢子的速度并留存更多储备，以强化她的轻微感染。

description.desc: The effects of Symbiotic Infection and Symbiotic Healing are increased by $amount% after Sisaspia has used at least 30 spores in the current area.^^$sisaspia_spores_used
当西萨庇亚在当前区域使用至少 30 个备用孢子后，“共生感染”和“共生愈合”的效果提高 $amount%。^^$sisaspia_spores_used

specializationDescription.original: Sisaspia is one with the spores and is at her most potent when she has infected many enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 西萨庇亚化身孢子使者，在感染许多敌人后发挥最强实力。

description.original: Aid you... yess. I desire nothing in return.
description.display: 帮助你......是的，我不求回报。

description.original: Come, lesser species. I sshall lead you to victory.
description.display: 来吧，低等种族。我将带领你走向胜利。

description.original: You are no good to me dead. Get up and fight the enemiess.
description.display: 你死了对我没好处。站起来，和敌人战斗。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Sisaspia's Symbiotic Healing by $amount%

description.original: Amazing what a little infection in the right sspot can fix.
description.display: 多么令人惊讶，在适当的位置，一点点感染就能解决问题。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Sisaspia's Symbiotic Healing by $amount%

description.original: Air is replaced with sspores. Life is replaced with death.
description.display: 空气被孢子取代。生命被死亡取代。

description.original: My sspores are the result of years of research and... experimentation.
description.display: 我的孢子源自于多年的研究......和试验。
深呼吸吧，你们这些蠢货。

description.original: Don't be afraid. It just wantss to live.
description.display: 不要害怕。它只想活下去。

description.original: With the proper nudge, even the most impotent lessser species can be useful.
description.display: 只要有适当的推动，即使是最无能的低等种族也能发挥作用。

description.original: Growth is our only method of ssurvival.
description.display: 繁殖是我们唯一的生存方式。

effects.description: Increases Sisaspia's maximum spore reserve by $amount

description.original: Thisss isn't even itsss final form.
description.display: 这甚至都不是它的最终形态。

character_sheet_details.backstory: An outcast even from her home city of Omu on Chult, Sisaspia does not seek wealth or glory for herself. Instead, she wishes only to hone her powers, and anyone or anything that gets in her way will learn that she has already made great strides towards doing so. A reluctant ally, she joins the Champions solely because they are a means to an end: an endless stream of foes on which to unleash and perfect her sinister machinations.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Sisaspia uses her halo of spores to infect her enemies, causing them to take more damage over time. She also empowers and heals her allies based on her unused spores.

event_upgrades.name: Halo of Spores
event_upgrades.description: Sisaspia maintains a reserve of small, near-invisible spores which she infects enemies with as they approach. Infected enemies take additional damage over time from all hits.

event_upgrades.name: Symbiotic Infection
event_upgrades.description: Sisaspia buffs those nearby using her reserve of spores, increasing their damage and eventually healing them as well.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 即使在她的家乡--楚尔特的奥穆，西萨庇亚也是被抛弃的人。她不为自己谋求财富或荣耀，相反，她只希望磨练自己的力量。任何挡在她路上的人或事，都会了解到她的努力已经取得了多大的回报。她不情愿地加入勇士的队伍，只是为了把他们当成达成目标的一种手段：有无穷无尽的敌人，可以供她释放和完善她的邪恶阴谋。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 西萨庇亚使用孢子光晕感染敌人，使其受到的伤害逐渐提高。她也会基于未使用的孢子数量，强化和治疗她的盟友。
